title: myosotis sylvatica proles suaveolens
intro: Myosotis sylvatica proles suaveolens, also known as the woodland forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Myosotis sylvatica proles suaveolens include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat a range of skin conditions and promote overall health and well-being.
